# VnMapPlugin Docs Refactor Design

**Date:** 2026-05-30
**Goal:** Replace all `@rnmapbox/maps` / Mapbox branding in documentation, add prop-level examples, and relocate internal working notes.

---

## 1. Scope & File Inventory

### Auto-generated docs (45 files in `docs/`)
Generated by `yarn generate` via `scripts/templates/component.md.ejs`. Fixed at the template level — no direct `.md` editing. Running `yarn generate` after the template fix produces clean output.

### Manually written docs (6 files in `docs/`)
- `GettingStarted.md`, `VnMapPlugin.md`, `CustomHttpHeaders.md`, `Logger.md`, `StyleSheet.md`, `Annotations.md`
- Edited directly: branding swept, spec links redirected to local `docs/` equivalents.

### Root docs
- `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `RELEASE.md`, `README-v10.md`, `AGENTS.md`
- Swept for branding.
- `README-v10.md` gets a deprecation notice at the top rather than being deleted.

### Internal working notes → `.planning/`
- `findings.md`, `progress.md`, `task_plan.md` moved to `.planning/`
- `.planning/` added to `.gitignore`

---

## 2. Branding Replacement Rules

| Old | New |
|-----|-----|
| `@rnmapbox/maps` | `@vnmapplugin/maps` |
| `import { X } from '@rnmapbox/maps'` | `import { X } from '@vnmapplugin/maps'` |
| `# Mapbox` (heading) | `# VnMapPlugin` |
| `Mapbox Native GL` | `VnMapPlugin Native GL` |
| `Mapbox.StyleURL` | `VnMapPlugin.StyleURL` |
| `Mapbox.StyleSource` | `VnMapPlugin.StyleSource` |
| `RNMBXModule.MapboxV10` | `RNMBXModule.VnMapV10` |
| `custom_edit_url: https://github.com/rnmapbox/maps/...` | `custom_edit_url: https://github.com/tommyannguyen/vnmapplugin/...` |
| `https://docs.mapbox.com/style-spec/reference/layers/#<name>` | `./LayerName.md` (relative, since generated files live in `docs/`) |
| `https://docs.mapbox.com/mapbox-gl-js/style-spec/layers/#<name>` | `./LayerName.md` (relative, since generated files live in `docs/`) |
| `Mapbox spec:` | `VnMapPlugin style spec:` |
| `@experimental This component requires Mapbox Maps SDK` | `@experimental This component requires VnMapPlugin SDK` |

**Where changes happen:**
- `scripts/templates/component.md.ejs` — fixes all auto-generated doc output permanently
- `scripts/autogenHelpers/MarkdownBuilder.mjs` (if branding is embedded there)
- 6 manually written `docs/` files — direct text edits
- Root `.md` files — direct text edits

After template changes, `yarn generate` is run to regenerate all 45 auto-generated docs.

---

## 3. Prop-Level Examples

### Mechanism
A new mapping file `scripts/autogenHelpers/exampleMap.json` maps `ComponentName.propName` keys to example file paths:

```json
{
  "MapView.styleURL": "example/src/examples/Map/ShowMap.tsx",
  "Camera.centerCoordinate": "example/src/examples/Camera/SetPitch.js",
  "ShapeSource.shape": "example/src/examples/FillRasterLayer/QueryAtPoint.js"
}
```

The EJS template (`component.md.ejs`) gains a helper `examplePropLink(prop, component)` that:
- Looks up `ComponentName.propName` in the map
- If found, emits: `> See example: [FileName](../example/src/examples/...)` beneath the prop description
- If not found, emits nothing — no placeholder noise

### Initial coverage
Start with the highest-traffic components: `MapView`, `Camera`, `ShapeSource`, `CircleLayer`, `LineLayer`, `FillLayer`. Expand the map incrementally.

### What this is not
Does not inline code snippets from example files. Links only — avoids fragile extraction logic and keeps docs in sync with the example app naturally.

---

## 4. Internal Notes Relocation

```
findings.md   → .planning/findings.md
progress.md   → .planning/progress.md
task_plan.md  → .planning/task_plan.md
```

`.planning/` added to `.gitignore`.

`README-v10.md` stays in root with a deprecation notice prepended:
```md
> **Deprecated:** This document covers the legacy v10 configuration. See [README.md](./README.md) for current setup.
```

---

## 5. Implementation Phases

### Phase 1 — Internal notes cleanup
- Move `findings.md`, `progress.md`, `task_plan.md` to `.planning/`
- Add `.planning/` to `.gitignore`
- Add deprecation notice to `README-v10.md`

### Phase 2 — Template fix
- Update `scripts/templates/component.md.ejs`:
  - Replace `@rnmapbox/maps` → `@vnmapplugin/maps` in import block
  - Replace `https://github.com/rnmapbox/maps/` → `https://github.com/tommyannguyen/vnmapplugin/` in `custom_edit_url`
  - Replace `Mapbox spec:` → `VnMapPlugin style spec:`
  - Replace `https://docs.mapbox.com/...` spec links → local relative `docs/` links
  - Replace remaining `Mapbox` brand references
- Check `MarkdownBuilder.mjs` for any hardcoded branding
- Run `yarn generate` to regenerate all 45 docs

### Phase 3 — Manual doc sweep
- Edit 6 manually written `docs/` files: apply replacement table
- Edit root `.md` files: `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `RELEASE.md`, `AGENTS.md`
- Verify no `@rnmapbox` or `Mapbox` brand references remain: `grep -r "rnmapbox\|@rnmapbox\|Mapbox" docs/ *.md`

### Phase 4 — Prop-level examples
- Create `scripts/autogenHelpers/exampleMap.json` with initial mappings for 6 core components
- Add `examplePropLink` helper to EJS template
- Run `yarn generate` again to produce docs with example links
- Verify links resolve correctly

### Phase 5 — Final verification
- Run `yarn generate` clean pass — confirm no regressions
- Run `yarn lint` and `yarn type:check`
- Grep for any remaining old references across all `.md` files

---

## 6. Success Criteria

- `grep -r "@rnmapbox" docs/ *.md` returns zero results
- `grep -r "Mapbox" docs/ *.md` returns zero results (excluding `.planning/`)
- All 45 auto-generated docs import from `@vnmapplugin/maps`
- Core component docs (MapView, Camera, ShapeSource, CircleLayer, LineLayer, FillLayer) have prop-level example links
- `findings.md`, `progress.md`, `task_plan.md` no longer in project root
- `yarn generate` produces clean output with no branding regressions
- `yarn lint` and `yarn type:check` pass
